title: Resolva Xtra Fast Weedkiller RTU 1L
description: Product Description Resolva Xpress Weedkiller controls a range of annual and perennial broad-leaved weeds and grasses within hours, without glyphosate. Its non-selective formula kills by contact action only and acts by desiccation of target weed. Ingredients Contains 31.02 g/l (3.1% w/w) Pelargonic Acid Directions Kill weeds by contact action Safety Warning Avoid contact with skin and eyes Manufacturer Contact Information Marketing Company: Westland Horticulture Limited, 14 Granville Industrial Estate, Granville Road, Dungannon, Co Tyrone, BT70 1NJ.
